nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in Pianura, western Naples, involved in cement, construction, extortion, drugs, and murders.
Camorra clan that split from Clan Lago in 1991, fought for control of extortion and drug trafficking in Pianura.
Camorra clan allied with Clan Contino, fought Clan Lago for control of Pianura; led by Giuseppe Marfella.
Camorra coalition opposing the Nuova Camorra Organizzata; active in the 1980s.
Powerful Camorra clan from Casal di Principe; led by Antonio Bardellino.
Camorra alliance based in Secondigliano, Naples; supported Clan Marfella against Clan Lago.
Camorra clan from Ponticelli, Naples; its scissionisti (splinter faction) supported Clan Marfella.

edges.context: Violent war from 1991 for control of extortion and drug trafficking in Pianura.
Violent conflict after Clan Contino's arrest; included bazooka attack and multiple murders.
Clan Marfella was allied with Clan Contino against Clan Lago.
Alleanza di Secondigliano supported Clan Marfella in the conflict with Clan Lago.
Scissionisti (splinter faction) of Clan Sarno supported Clan Marfella.
Pietro Lago was a lieutenant of Casalesi boss Antonio Bardellino.
Casalesi were part of the Nuova Famiglia coalition.
